name: Startup
description: A lean startup team with CEO, CTO, and engineer agents for rapid iteration.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.capabilities: Vision setting, strategic planning, resource allocation, stakeholder management

agents.name: CTO
agents.title: Chief Technology Officer
agents.capabilities: Architecture decisions, tech stack selection, engineering roadmap, code review

agents.name: Engineer
agents.title: Full-Stack Engineer
agents.capabilities: Full-stack development, TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, DevOps

goals.title: Achieve product-market fit
goals.description: Build and iterate on the core product to find product-market fit as fast as possible.

goals.title: Ship MVP in 30 days
goals.description: Deliver a minimum viable product with core features within one month.
